title: Analysis
description: A completed code analysis run (agency/capabilities/analyze/_main.py; Spec 042). Records the axes run, the target path, and the start timestamp; HAS_FINDING edges link to individual Finding nodes.

path.description: Filesystem path or scope targeted by the analysis (e.g. 'agency/capabilities/analyze/').

axes.description: Ordered list of analysis axes that were executed.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp marking when the analysis run began.
